Home.title: Plan your trip with a smart assistant
Home.subtitle: Enter your details and TripAi builds you a complete plan, day by day, tailored to you.

smart.title: Smart planning
smart.description: Itineraries built around your tastes, budget, and travel rhythm.

adaptive.title: Adapts on the fly
adaptive.description: Weather changes, things you skip, live suggestions. The app reorganizes with you.

simple.title: No fuss
simple.description: Clear buttons, no confusing chat. Made for enjoying, not reading screens.

welcome.title: Welcome to TripAi!
welcome.description: In a few minutes we'll collect the details of your trip. You can come back and edit anytime.

destination.title: Where are you going?
destination.moreCitiesQuestion: Are you visiting other cities in the same trip?
